name: Frolic Cooling Unit
summary: Frolic Cooling Unit — a accessory for keeping your kit running.
description: Internal vapour cooling assembly for the Frolic Thermal Extractor, designed to regulate vapour temperature, refine airflow, and enhance overall draw smoothness. The Frolic Internal Cooling Module is a revised internal component set that installs within the Frolic Thermal Extractor mouthpiece system. Its multi-part design helps lower vapour temperature prior to inhalation while preserving airflow balance and flavour definition. Suitable as a replacement assembly or spare to maintain original device performance. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
